sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63603" key="li/sswsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λίσσ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63603.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">setting of the hair from the crown of the head</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:491b:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">491b8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
